news.headline: Ogra, PSO come under fire for poor monitoring of oil stocks
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: The Oil and Gas Regulatory Authority (Ogra) and Pakistan State Oil (PSO) on Monday came under fire for insufficient and lethargic online integration and automation of stock and supply position of oil products for improved visibility and monitoring.</p>
